case_title: SAU YING CHEUNG VS. GUO WEN HE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY CHEUNG, SAU YING AS TO DEFENDANT HE, GUO WEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, SAU YING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED MAY-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HE, GUO WEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. GERALD LO AND CONNIE LAI ACT AS CONTONESE INTERPRETERS FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, SAU YING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HE, GUO WEN $225.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $275.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HE, GUO WEN
